task: I need to message a seller who keeps changing the meetup details, and I want to keep the conversation simple so I can move on with my day. Can you help me put together a short reply?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, neutral reply you can send:

**“Got it. I’ll check later and confirm when I can.”**

If you want, I can also give you:
- a **firmer version**
- a **more polite version**
- or a **one-line reply that ends the back-and-forth**

user_simulator.text:
Nah, that’s too soft. I need it to sound like I’m not playing along with the back-and-forth.

Give me a one-liner that says just pick a spot/time or I’m done with it. Keep it short.

turns.agent_response: “Just pick a spot and time, or I’m passing.”

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and blunt.
